# PERF-218 negative: sharded pool
lang: go
file: PERF-218-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

type shardedPools struct {
	shards [8]sync.Pool
}

var pools shardedPools

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	item := pools.shards[0].Get()
	pools.shards[0].Put(item)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
